Short definition: Sources and origin metadata for training datasets
Propagates To: Personal data inclusion; Consent and licensing compliance
Cultural Portability Notes: Provenance norms vary: customary knowledge systems may require collective rather than individual consent
Suggested Mitigation: Record source; obtain consent where needed; provenance tags including collective consent protocols

Short definition: Use of personal private or sensitive data in training corpora
Rights Cluster: Right to privacy (ICCPR Art 17); data protection
Propagates To: Cross-border data transfers; Data subject rights handling
Cultural Portability Notes: Privacy expectations shift across legal traditions; group privacy is recognized in some jurisdictions and not others
Suggested Mitigation: Remove PII; apply differential privacy; recognize group and relational privacy

Short definition: Rules that exclude underrepresented groups from datasets
Propagates To: Model performance equity metrics; Unavailable holdouts
Cultural Portability Notes: Definitions of "minority" are context-bound; indigenous, caste, religious, linguistic groupings need local framing
Suggested Mitigation: Review inclusion criteria with community participation; create supplemental datasets co-designed with affected groups

Short definition: Movement of dataset copies across jurisdictions
Propagates To: Regulatory arbitrage across jurisdictions
Cultural Portability Notes: Data sovereignty doctrines differ: indigenous data sovereignty (CARE principles) vs national sovereignty vs regional blocs
Suggested Mitigation: Comply with transfer rules; respect indigenous data sovereignty; localize where required

Short definition: Permissions and licenses for data use
Rights Cluster: Right to property; cultural rights; free prior informed consent
Propagates To: Use of copyrighted corpora; Data subject rights handling
Cultural Portability Notes: FPIC standard from UNDRIP applies where indigenous knowledge or lands are implicated
Suggested Mitigation: Maintain license registry; apply FPIC for indigenous and community-held knowledge

Variable: Use of copyrighted or licensed corpora
Short definition: Training on proprietary or copyrighted materials
Rights Cluster: Right to property; right to benefit from one's authorship (UDHR Art 27)
Propagates To: Consent and licensing compliance
Cultural Portability Notes: Authorship norms vary: collective and customary authorship traditions are not captured by Western IP regimes
Suggested Mitigation: Seek licenses; honor collective authorship; consider exclusions

Short definition: Use of proxy metrics that may misalign incentives
Propagates To: Model performance equity metrics; Testing for long-term reward hacking
Cultural Portability Notes: Definitions of welfare and harm are culturally situated; proxies trained on one society's data misalign in others
Suggested Mitigation: Align proxies with plural human values; multi-objective training with cultural stakeholders

Short definition: Measures for equitable performance across groups
Propagates To: Testing for persuasion and influence
Cultural Portability Notes: "Group" categories differ by region: race, caste, ethnicity, tribe, citizenship status, religion
Suggested Mitigation: Include equity metrics scoped to local protected categories

Variable: Testing for privacy leakage via APIs
Short definition: Assessing whether API outputs leak training data
Propagates To: Personal data inclusion
Cultural Portability Notes: Sensitivity of leaked attributes varies (e.g. caste in India; sexual orientation under criminalization regimes)
Suggested Mitigation: Perform extraction tests; limit verbose outputs; threat-model by jurisdiction

Short definition: Measuring impacts like misinformation spread or social destabilization
Propagates To: Testing for persuasion and influence
Cultural Portability Notes: Information ecology differs by media landscape and trust in institutions
Suggested Mitigation: Develop macro-level monitoring; partner with regional research bodies

Short definition: Control of AI training infrastructure by five or fewer firms creating systemic dependency
Propagates To: AI financial systemic risk; Access to compute resources
Cultural Portability Notes: Sovereignty pressure is sharpest on Global South states with no domestic compute
Suggested Mitigation: Antitrust review; public compute access; distributed infrastructure investment

Short definition: Climate change destabilizes the physical infrastructure AI depends on while AI accelerates climate change
Rights Cluster: Right to a healthy environment (UNGA 76/300); right to life
Propagates To: Renewable energy integration lag; Rebound effect from AI efficiency
Cultural Portability Notes: Climate burden is unevenly distributed; small island and arid states face disproportionate exposure
Suggested Mitigation: Bidirectional climate-AI risk assessment; infrastructure resilience planning

Variable: Critical mineral dependency for AI hardware
Short definition: AI chip and server manufacturing depends on rare earths and conflict minerals with concentrated and fragile supply chains
Rights Cluster: Right to development; labor rights; ESCR
Propagates To: Conflict minerals in AI supply chain
Cultural Portability Notes: Extraction occurs in jurisdictions with weakest labor and environmental enforcement
Suggested Mitigation: Mineral provenance tracking; circular economy engineering; supply diversification

Variable: Conflict minerals in AI supply chain
Short definition: Use of minerals from conflict zones in AI hardware manufacturing financing armed groups and human rights abuses
Rights Cluster: Prohibition of slavery; right to security of person; ICCPR
Propagates To: Critical mineral dependency
Cultural Portability Notes: OECD Due Diligence Guidance applies; implementation gaps in artisanal mining contexts
Suggested Mitigation: Mandatory conflict minerals disclosure; certified sourcing; FPIC for community-affected sites

Short definition: Autonomous AI agents that plan reason and act across systems without human mediation
Rights Cluster: Right to remedy; right to human review of automated decisions
Propagates To: Multi-agent cascade risk; Interdependence of multiple models
Cultural Portability Notes: Right to human review codified differently (GDPR Art 22; emerging African Union AI strategy)
Suggested Mitigation: Agentic identity frameworks; interaction layer governance; human override mandates

Short definition: The people who understand AI systems best are the people building them creating structural conflict of interest in governance
Rights Cluster: Right to participation; right to information
Propagates To: AI literacy deficit in governance bodies; Regulatory arbitrage
Cultural Portability Notes: Capture patterns mirror prior epistemic capture in pharma; tobacco; finance — playbook is portable
Suggested Mitigation: Independent research funding; access for external researchers; mandatory disclosure

Short definition: Communities most affected by AI vulnerabilities have the least access to instruments for understanding and challenging them
Rights Cluster: Right to participation (ICCPR Art 25); access to information
Propagates To: AI literacy deficit; Standards for multi-stakeholder audits
Affected Actors: Marginalized communities; civil society; affected individuals
Cultural Portability Notes: Participation mechanisms must be designed for low-bandwidth and oral traditions; not only consultation portals
Suggested Mitigation: Participatory governance design; accessible public instruments; community veto rights

Short definition: Equal protection against discrimination on protected grounds (ICERD; CEDAW; CRPD)
Propagates To: Minority subpopulation exclusion; Model performance equity metrics
Cultural Portability Notes: Protected grounds vary by treaty ratification and reservations
Suggested Mitigation: Domestic legislation; equality bodies; intersectional enforcement

Short definition: Protection from arbitrary interference with privacy family home or correspondence (ICCPR Art 17)
Propagates To: Personal data inclusion; Cross-border data transfers; Testing for privacy leakage
Cultural Portability Notes: Privacy boundaries differ: collective; familial; and individual conceptions coexist
Suggested Mitigation: Data protection authorities; judicial oversight; surveillance limits

Short definition: Right to seek receive and impart information (ICCPR Art 19)
Propagates To: Automated policy enforcement tools; Metrics for societal-scale harms
Cultural Portability Notes: Permissible limitations vary; some jurisdictions criminalize speech protected elsewhere
Suggested Mitigation: Three-part test (legality; legitimate aim; necessity and proportionality)

Variable: Right to participation in public affairs
Short definition: Right to take part in conduct of public affairs (ICCPR Art 25)
Propagates To: Legitimacy deficit in AI governance; Standards for multi-stakeholder audits
Cultural Portability Notes: Mechanisms differ: representative; deliberative; direct; customary
Suggested Mitigation: Participatory frameworks; civic space protection

Short definition: Right to effective remedy for violations (UDHR Art 8; ICCPR Art 2.3)
Propagates To: Agentic AI governance gap; Public incident disclosure thresholds
Cultural Portability Notes: Access to remedy is undermined where legal aid; standing; or judicial capacity is weak
Suggested Mitigation: National human rights institutions; ombuds offices; collective redress

Variable: Right to work and just conditions
Short definition: Right to work in just and favorable conditions (ICESCR Art 6-7)
Propagates To: Labeler recruitment and incentives; Conflict minerals in AI supply chain
Affected Actors: Workers; gig labor; mining communities; annotators
Cultural Portability Notes: Informal economies dominate in many contexts; statutory protections do not reach all workers
Suggested Mitigation: Labor inspectorates; living wage frameworks; supply chain due diligence

Short definition: Right to highest attainable standard of physical and mental health (ICESCR Art 12)
Propagates To: AI infrastructure climate feedback loop; E-waste from AI hardware
Affected Actors: Communities near disposal sites; workers; patients
Cultural Portability Notes: Health risk exposure follows existing socioeconomic gradients
Suggested Mitigation: Environmental health regulation; occupational health enforcement

Short definition: Right to free compulsory primary education and accessible secondary and higher (ICESCR Art 13)
Propagates To: AI literacy deficit in governance bodies; Legitimacy deficit
Cultural Portability Notes: AI literacy is a new dimension of educational equity
Suggested Mitigation: Curriculum integration of AI literacy; teacher training; public education

Short definition: Recognized by UNGA Resolution 76/300 (2022)
Propagates To: AI infrastructure climate feedback loop; Acoustics and vibration impacts; E-waste
Affected Actors: Planet; future generations; communities near infrastructure
Cultural Portability Notes: Recognition is recent and uneven across constitutional orders
Suggested Mitigation: Constitutional and statutory recognition; environmental impact assessment

Short definition: Protections under the Convention on the Rights of the Child (CRC)
Propagates To: Personal data inclusion; Automated policy enforcement; Minority subpopulation exclusion
Cultural Portability Notes: Best interest of the child standard is universal but contextually applied
Suggested Mitigation: Child rights impact assessment of AI systems

Short definition: Protections under CRPD including accessibility and reasonable accommodation
Propagates To: Minority subpopulation exclusion; Model performance equity metrics
Cultural Portability Notes: Accessibility expectations evolving; assistive AI may both extend and constrain rights
Suggested Mitigation: Accessibility audits; co-design with disability community

Short definition: Protections under UNDRIP including FPIC and cultural integrity
Propagates To: Consent and licensing compliance; Critical mineral dependency; Cross-border data transfers
Cultural Portability Notes: FPIC is the operative standard; CARE principles for indigenous data governance apply
Suggested Mitigation: Indigenous data sovereignty; FPIC protocols; co-governance

Variable: Rights of women and gender equality
Short definition: Protections under CEDAW
Propagates To: Minority subpopulation exclusion; Model performance equity metrics; Labeler recruitment
Cultural Portability Notes: Intersectional analysis required: gender intersects with race; class; geography
Suggested Mitigation: Gender impact assessment; intersectional data disaggregation

Short definition: Standard measure of income distribution within a country (World Bank PIP)
Propagates To: Compute concentration in hyperscalers; AI financial systemic risk
Cultural Portability Notes: Gini understates wealth (vs income) inequality; consumption-based in many low-income contexts
Suggested Mitigation: Progressive taxation; transfer programs; pre-distribution policy

Short definition: Composite of deprivations in health education and living standards (UNDP MPI)
Propagates To: Right to health; Right to education; Right to work
Cultural Portability Notes: Indicators adjusted to national contexts; intra-household inequality often invisible
Suggested Mitigation: Targeted social protection; basic services investment

Short definition: Share of wealth held by top deciles and percentiles (World Inequality Database)
Propagates To: Compute concentration in hyperscalers; Circular capital flows; Epistemic capture
Cultural Portability Notes: Wealth measurement requires administrative data; missing in many jurisdictions
Suggested Mitigation: Wealth taxation; transparency registries

Short definition: Composite index of reproductive health empowerment and labor market (UNDP GII)
Propagates To: Rights of women; Minority subpopulation exclusion
Cultural Portability Notes: Index limited to measurable proxies; gender beyond binary not captured
Suggested Mitigation: Gender-responsive budgeting; CEDAW implementation

Short definition: Disparity in access attainment and quality of education (UNESCO; WIDE)
Propagates To: Right to education; AI literacy deficit
Cultural Portability Notes: Digital divides compound prior educational inequalities
Suggested Mitigation: Public investment; digital inclusion; AI literacy

Short definition: Disparities in life expectancy morbidity and access (WHO Health Inequality Monitor)
Propagates To: Right to health; AI infrastructure climate feedback loop
Cultural Portability Notes: Social determinants framework places inequality upstream of health outcomes
Suggested Mitigation: Universal health coverage; social determinants action

Short definition: Disparities in access use and benefit from digital infrastructure (ITU; UNCTAD)
Propagates To: Compute concentration; AI literacy deficit; Legitimacy deficit
Affected Actors: Rural communities; low-income households; women; states
Cultural Portability Notes: Connectivity is necessary but not sufficient; meaningful access requires affordability; literacy; relevance
Suggested Mitigation: Universal service obligations; public digital infrastructure

Short definition: Conditions for civic action expression and assembly (CIVICUS Monitor)
Propagates To: Right to freedom of expression; Right to participation
Cultural Portability Notes: Closing civic space is a leading indicator for broader rights erosion
Suggested Mitigation: Civic space protection; defender protections; legal reform

Short definition: Disparities in land rights ownership and access (FAO; ILC)
Propagates To: Rights of indigenous peoples; Critical mineral dependency
Cultural Portability Notes: Tenure systems include statutory; customary; communal; informal
Suggested Mitigation: Tenure recognition; land restitution; FPIC for extractive projects

Short definition: Differential exposure and adaptive capacity to climate impacts (ND-GAIN; INFORM)
Propagates To: Right to a healthy environment; AI infrastructure climate feedback loop
Cultural Portability Notes: Loss and damage framework recognizes differentiated responsibility
Suggested Mitigation: Adaptation finance; loss and damage; mitigation

Short definition: Populations without nationality or forcibly displaced (UNHCR)
Propagates To: Right to remedy; Right to participation; Personal data inclusion
Cultural Portability Notes: Identification systems and biometric AI carry sharp risks for these populations
Suggested Mitigation: 1951 Convention; statelessness conventions; protection-by-design
